title: What to Build vs Buy, Agent Edition
concept: Deciding when to use frameworks (like LangGraph or CrewAI) versus build bare-metal state machines.

exercises.prompt: What is a common mistake when building AI agents?
exercises.explain: One common mistake is using multiple tools without proper monitoring, which can lead to ungoverned execution.

cards.title: Build vs Buy: A Big Decision
cards.body: When creating an AI agent, you often face a crucial choice: Should you build your own solution from scratch, or should you buy and use existing frameworks?

cards.title: What is Building vs Buying?
cards.body: Building refers to creating everything yourself, while buying means using existing tools or platforms that are ready to go.

cards.title: Building a House vs Buying a Condo
cards.body: Think of it like building a house from the ground up versus buying a condo. Building offers customization, but buying is quicker and often simpler.

cards.title: Example: Language Models
cards.body: If you want an AI that understands language, buying a pre-trained model speeds up the process. But if your needs are very unique, building from scratch might be necessary.

cards.title: Myth: Building is Always Better
cards.body: It's a common myth that building your own solution is always better. However, choosing to buy can save time and resources.

left.text: Custom, tailored solutions require more time and skills.

right.text: Ready-to-use frameworks are faster but might limit customization.

exercises.prompt: When might you choose to buy a framework instead of building from scratch?

options.text: When you have very specific needs
When you want a quick solution
When you are completely new to AI
When you can afford extra resources

exercises.explain: You might choose to buy a framework when you need a quick solution that saves time and effort.

exercises.prompt: Buying an AI framework means you'll have to do everything yourself.
exercises.explain: False! Buying a framework allows you to use pre-made solutions rather than doing everything from scratch.

exercises.prompt: Choosing to ________ can save a lot of time when starting with AI agents.
exercises.sentence: Choosing to buy can save a lot of time when starting with AI agents.
exercises.explain: The correct answer is 'buy' because it implies using existing solutions that are ready to use.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is an example of a situation where buying a framework makes sense?

options.text: You are looking for a fast way to launch an AI agent.
You want complete control over every aspect of the AI.
You plan to experiment with advanced algorithms.

exercises.explain: The correct choice is when you want a fast solution; buying a framework can help you launch your AI agent quickly.

exercises.prompt: When considering whether to build or buy for an AI agent, which scenario indicates buying is the better option?

options.text: You have a unique need and no current solutions.
You need immediate deployment and reliable results.
You have a tight budget and can build cheaper.
You are looking for a custom AI for a long-term project.

exercises.explain: The best scenario for buying is when you need immediate deployment and reliable results, as existing frameworks can provide this much faster than building a solution from scratch.
